subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the holy sanctuary in the wilderness of divine knowledge, the spot wherein shineth forth and is kindled the Sacred Fire [3.5s]... ...By the righteousness of God! The world, its vanities and its glory, and whatever delights it can offer, are all, in the sight of God, as worthless
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع لما یوحی الیک عن شطر القدس بریه العرفان مقر الذی فیه یوقد و یضیء
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
